Y=function(Y,h,a,k,r)return L(w,{Y;h,a,k;r},p,M)end return Y end,{},function(w,p)local M=G(p)local Y=function(Y,h,a)return L(w,{Y;h,a},p,M)end return Y end,790991-790991,function(w)local p,L=84482-84481,w[595316+-595315]while L do e[L],p=e[L]-(136570+-136569),(325045+-325044)+p if 686161-686161==e[L]then e[L],E[L]=nil,nil end L=w[p]end end return(v(854680-(-831020),{}))(M(r))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[p(-895614+855866)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
